<{%reset%}>    [id=c73f08ae-b650-4b67-99fe-87b1bbe7c23a]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:providers:pkgA::default]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%reset%}>  pkgA:m:typA: (same)
<{%reset%}>    [id=created-id-0]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::resA]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%reset%}>  pkgA:m:typAView: (same)
<{%reset%}>        [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA$pkgA:m:typAView::resA-child]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 1%}>- pkgA:m:typAView: (delete)
<{%fg 1%}>        [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA$pkgA:m:typAView::resA-child]
